case.title: INDIANAPOLIS & ST L R CO v. VANCE

opinion.h: INDIANAPOLIS & ST L R CO v. VANCE, 154 U.S. 638 (1878)
INDIANAPOLIS & ST. L. R. CO. v. JAMES L. VANCE et al. No. 897.
opinion.p: Mr. Justice HARLAN delivered the opinion of the court.
The decision just rendered in case No. 896 (96 U.S. 450), between the same parties, controls the decision in this case.
